title: docs: fix typos and grammar in docs and app listings
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Re-applies #12119 onto current main with credit to @murderszn (original conflicted because the generated GREENHOUSE.md was hand-edited)
- Fixes heading in CONTRIBUTING.md, capitalization in SECURITY.md, "non profite" → "non-profit" in apps/APPS.md
- GREENHOUSE.md regenerated via `app-update-greenhouse.js`

Closes #12119

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Dotting the i's
gist.blurb: Swept through the documentation to fix a few typos and grammar hiccups. Everything is looking a little sharper!
gist.summary: Fixed minor typos and grammar issues across CONTRIBUTING.md, SECURITY.md, and the app listings.
gist.impact: Documentation and app listings are now cleaner and more professional.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing reading glasses, holding a tiny pencil, correcting a large pixelated document. Nomnom creature eating the typos (crumpled paper).
